name: Ankle MRI
description: MRI of the ankle for ligament, tendon, and osteochondral evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the ankle was performed with T1, T2, and fat-saturated sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Ligaments
sections.content: Anterior talofibular ligament [intact]. Calcaneofibular ligament [intact]. Posterior talofibular ligament [intact].

sections.name: Tendons
sections.content: Achilles tendon [intact / no tear / no tendinosis]. Tibialis posterior [intact]. Peroneal tendons [intact].

sections.name: Talus
sections.content: Talar dome [no osteochondral lesion / no bone marrow edema].

impression:
1. No ligamentous injury.
2. No tendon tear.
3. Normal ankle MRI.
author: RadReport Templates
